title: Mega TNT Mod
description: This Mod adds over 200 Explosives to Minecraft. You can create things with house TNT or Forest TNT or destroy all the Minecraft world with the Tier MEGA TNTs.
body:
This Mod adds over 200 Explosives to Minecraft. All of the TNTs and Dynamites have crafting recipes, so you can also try to get them in survival! None of the tnts will lag or crash your computer except the Anti RAM TNT (made to crash on purpose). You can have some fun by creating things with House TNT or Forest TNT or if you want to destroy all the Minecraft world the Tier MEGA TNTs are the perfect solution.

 

If you are a YouTuber and would like to feature my mod in one of your videos, I would greatly appreciate if you included a link to this site in your video description. It's done in no time and is a sign of respect towards me the creator and your viewers who might want to download this mod.

Thank you very much!
